Veterans Benefits: Florida has no state personal income tax, so military retirement and other retirement income are not taxed at the state level. Florida also offers disabled veteran homestead/property tax exemptions, in-state tuition support for eligible veterans using GI Bill benefits, employment preference, and state veterans homes.
LGBTQSource: HRC MEI 2025 + MAP state policy score
Description: Central Florida city with a large VA medical center, major hospital systems, tourism and arts amenities, and a nationally important modeling, simulation, and training technology cluster. Orlando offers strong healthcare and recreation access, but housing and insurance costs are elevated and the city has a higher violent-crime baseline than many retirement locations.
